docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $11,499.32 FILED BY LEGER, MAXIMILIAN AS TO DEFENDANT BHS HOME APPLIANCES CORPORATION (CA REG BHGS #A44283) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PAUL WHEELER FILED BY DEFENDANT BHS HOME APPLIANCES CORPORATION (CA REG BHGS #A44283)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MAXIMILIAN LEGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BHS HOME APPLIANCES CORP. IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEGER, MAXIMILIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BHS HOME APPLIANCES CORPORATION (CA REG BHGS #A44283) $2,150.32 PRINCIPAL, $178.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,328.32 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-07-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $99.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BHS HOME APPLIANCES CORPORATION (CA REG BHGS #A44283)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2026 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2025 - JUDGMENT.
